agent_create_discard_message: Your conversation will be lost. Are you sure?
agent_creator_prompt_hint: This prompt guides the AI assistant when helping you create new agents. It tells the AI what questions to ask and how to configure the agent.
agent_creator_prompt_reset_message: This will restore the default agent creator prompt. Your customizations will be lost.
agents_required_error: Unable to create session. Please check your connection and try again.
chat_not_connected_desc: Not connected to gateway. Please check your connection settings.
pairing_required_desc_prefix: Run this command on your gateway:
chat_start_desc: Send a message to begin chatting with your AI assistant.
chat_timeout_no_response: The assistant did not respond in time. Please try again.
chat_timeout_streaming: The response timed out while streaming. Please try again.
connection_duplicate: A connection with this gateway URL and token already exists
connection_url_invalid: URL must start with ws:// or wss://
connections_delete_confirm_message: Delete this connection? All messages will be lost.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding_getting_started_desc: Add a connection with your gateway URL and authentication token. Manage multiple gateways simultaneously and chat with AI agents from any device.
onboarding_openclaw_desc: Your gateway runs autonomous AI agents. ClawOn connects you directly — chat with agents, manage skills, and create custom AI agents from one app.
onboarding_welcome_desc: One app. All your AI gateways. Every platform. Manage multiple connections, chat with autonomous AI agents, and configure skills — wherever you are.
reset_confirm_message: This will permanently delete this chat and all its messages. Are you sure?
sessions_all_filtered_desc: No sessions match the current filter.
sessions_start_conversation: Start a conversation to create a session
sessions_create_offline_error: Connect to gateway to create a new session.
skill_create_discard_message: Your conversation will be lost. Are you sure you want to exit?
skill_creator_prompt_hint: This prompt guides the AI assistant when helping you create new skills. It tells the AI what questions to ask and how to structure the skill.
skill_creator_prompt_reset_message: This will restore the default skill creator prompt. Your customizations will be lost.
skill_no_env_vars: No environment variables required for this skill.
skills_empty_description: Connect to a gateway to view available skills
empty_no_connections_desc: Add your first AI gateway to start chatting with AI agents.
empty_no_sessions_desc: Start a new conversation to begin chatting with your AI assistant.
empty_no_messages_desc: Send a message to start the conversation.
empty_no_skills_desc: Skills extend your AI assistant's capabilities. Check back later.
empty_no_agents_desc: Create an agent to start conversations with AI.
empty_no_results_desc: Try adjusting your search terms or filters.
empty_start_conversation_desc: Type a message below to begin chatting with your AI assistant.
empty_error_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
empty_generic_desc: There's nothing to show right now.
error_network_message: Unable to connect to the server.
error_network_desc: Please check your internet connection and try again.
error_server_desc: The gateway is having issues. Please try again later.
error_auth_desc: Please log in again to continue.
error_permission_message: You don't have permission to access this.
error_permission_desc: Please contact support if you believe this is an error.
error_notfound_message: The requested resource was not found.
error_notfound_desc: It may have been moved or deleted.
error_validation_message: Please check your input and try again.
error_generic_desc: Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
connection_unpair_confirm_message: This will remove the device pairing. You'll need to enter your token again to reconnect.
